items.claim: Chase Hooper has poor striking defense.
items.quote: the guy has poor defense on the feet.

items.claim: Chase Hooper lacks high-level athleticism and strength.
items.quote: He has very bad athleticism. He's not very strong.

items.claim: Chase Hooper lacks the wrestling ability to consistently take opponents down.
items.quote: if you don't have wrestling to go over your jiu-jitsu, you're never going to be able to take your opponents down.

items.claim: Chase Hooper's kicking game is effective against less athletic opponents.
items.quote: I do think his kicking game will work on someone who isn't that athletic and fast twitch muscle fiber

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has decent defensive grappling skills.
items.quote: you see him defending the rear naked choke from Thiago Moyes and Mike Davis very, very well.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez lacks the athleticism and fast-twitch muscle fiber of fighters who have previously beaten Chase Hooper.
items.quote: Mitch Ramirez is not as athletic or fast twitch muscle fiber, fast on the feet as a lot of fighters that Chase Hooper has struggled with.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez possesses significant punching power.
items.quote: Mitch froze very hard. Yes, he might not be super athletic, but he froze very hard. He can definitely hurt Chase Hooper in this fight.
